name: Shaman
description: A hybrid caster balancing protection, healing and elemental attack. Shamans shield with ancestral ward, mend with cure and blast with lightning bolt, making a self-sufficient spellcaster; at level 15 they learn flame shock, searing a foe with clinging elemental fire, and at level 30 the stormcall totem, a group buff that sharpens the whole party's strikes and critical chance, then at level 45 a healing totem, a second, defensive totem whose steady pulse guards and mends the whole party, then at level 60 chain heal, a surging wave of healing water that leaps from ally to ally to mend the whole group at once.
